expectations.evidence: Clear Step 1 identifying operations, DAG characteristics, hard constraints (must be DAG, minimize makespan), and unlimited vs bounded parallelism distinction
Full comparison table: Topo Sort+CPM vs Heap-based List Scheduling vs BFS Level Scheduling across 7 criteria
Detailed complexity proof: O(V+E) for topo+CPM, O(V log V + E) for full scheduling, with per-phase breakdown
Extensive 4-phase pseudocode: build_graph, topological_sort, compute_critical_path_lengths, schedule_tasks
11 edge cases: empty graph, single task, fully sequential, fully parallel, diamond deps, cycles, zero-duration, disconnected, fan-in/out, P=1, CPL ties
Dedicated Python (deque, heapq, graphlib.TopologicalSorter), Rust (BinaryHeap+Reverse, petgraph), TypeScript (external heap lib, Map) sections
